title: Regeneron to Host Investor Call and Webcast on December 14, 2023 to Provide Updates Across Its Hematology Portfolio
text: TARRYTOWN, N.Y., Nov. 30, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN) will host a conference call and simultaneous webcast to provide an update on the company's hematology portfolio on Thursday, December 14, 2023 at 8:30 AM ET. This investor call follows Regeneron data updates presented at the 65th American Society of Hematology (ASH) Annual Meeting and Exposition, from December 9-12, 2023.

title: Regeneron (REGN), Sanofi's Dupixent Succeeds in 2nd COPD Study
text: Regeneron (REGN) and partner Sanofi (SNY) post positive data from the second COPD study and plan to submit a sBLA to the FDA by the end of 2023.

title: Dupixent® (dupilumab) Significantly Reduced COPD Exacerbations in Second Positive Phase 3 Trial, Accelerating FDA Submission and Confirming Potential to Become First Approved Biologic for This Serious Disease
text: NOTUS trial met its primary endpoint with overwhelming efficacy, showing Dupixent significantly reduced exacerbations by 34% compared to placebo in patients with moderate-to-severe COPD with evidence of type 2 inflammation (i.e., blood eosinophils ≥300 cells per μL), confirming results from the landmark BOREAS pivotal trial

title: Regeneron (REGN) Stock Rallies 10% YTD: What Lies Ahead?
text: Regeneron (REGN) shares gain 10% year to date on Eylea HD's approval and Dupixent's momentum. Pipeline progress is impressive as well.

title: 7 Underappreciated Biotech Stocks to Pick Up on the Cheap
text: Amid some rising questions for the economy, value-seeking investors may want to consider underappreciated biotech stocks. As a sector that, while not immune to broader pressures, generally manages to march to its own beat, the underlying innovation may offer an alternative upside pathway.

title: Celldex Makes A Bullish Move As It Looks To Take On Regeneron, Sanofi
text: Celldex could rival a key Regeneron drug, an analyst said Monday as CLDX stock rocketed on the results of multiple studies.

title: Regeneron: Analysis Of Vabysmo's Impact On Eylea Franchise
text: Regeneron reported strong Q3 2023 results, driven by the growth of Dupixent and Libtayo, as by Eylea holding up against Vabysmo. Claims by Roche of market share gains have not translated into significant erosion for Eylea, as Regeneron managed to find new patients elsewhere to partially make up for losing patients to Vabysmo. The approval and launch of Eylea HD puts Regeneron in a better position to defend the franchise against Vabysmo.

title: Regeneron (REGN) Q3 Earnings & Sales Top, Eylea Sales Decline
text: Regeneron (REGN) beats earnings and sales estimates in third-quarter 2023, fueled by Dupixent. However, sales of the lead drug, Eylea, fall yet again.

title: Regeneron (REGN) Q3 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Regeneron (REGN) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Regeneron Pharma's adjusted earnings beat estimates
text: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc.'s stock REGN, +1.46% rose fractionally on Thursday after the drug maker said its profit dropped by 23%, while its adjusted results beat analyst expectations. Regeneron said its third-quarter net income fell 23% to $1 billion, or $8.89 a share, from $1.32 billion, or $11.66 a share, in the year-ago quarter.

title: 1 Supercharged Growth Stock That Could Make You a Millionaire in 10 Years

title: Regeneron beats quarterly profit estimates on eczema treatment strength
text: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals on Thursday beat Wall Street estimates for third-quarter profit, driven by strong demand for its eczema treatment Dupixent.
